_note: TEMPLATE ONLY. The real profile.json holds personal data and is gitignored (kept local, never committed). Copy this file to profile.json and fill in your own values.

contributions.notes: Any context on the contribution amount.

preferences.growth_vs_dividends: e.g. balance of growth and some dividends

target_allocation.strategy: Plan 2.1: Max Growth, Trusted Optimizer (88% global all-world / 12% PH REITs)

sleeves.name: Global equity (growth engine, all-world)
sleeves.starting_vehicle: VT (Vanguard Total World Stock ETF) via a broker that custodies in your own name

sleeves.name: Local REITs (income satellite)
sleeves.composition: Split across a couple of quality REITs for sector diversification.
sleeves.notes: High-yield income, reinvested. Interest-rate sensitive; size it as a satellite, not the core.
